description: Eval fixtures for the correction-learning gate (T2). Splits: train (pairs are learned here), heldout (gate is measured here — same terms, different sentences), negative (false-rewrite corpus — zero custom terms). Voices: Paulina es_MX (Spanish-dominant speaker), Samantha en_US (English-dominant speaker). Synthetic speech via macOS `say` — documented limitation; replace with real dictation for the production benchmark (E4).
